settings.name: Name
settings.companyContextDesc: This context is loaded for every squad run. Use it to define your brand, tone, and guidelines.
settings.companyContextPlaceholder:
# My Company

## Brand
- Company name: Acme Corp
- Slogan: "Innovation that works"
- Tone of voice: Professional, friendly, clear
- Target audience: Small business owners, 25-45 years old

## Visual Identity
- Primary color: #2563EB (blue)
- Secondary color: #10B981 (green)
- Logo: Use the horizontal version on white backgrounds

## Content Guidelines
- Always address the reader as "you"
- Use short paragraphs (max 3 sentences)
- Include a call-to-action in every post
- Avoid jargon — write for non-technical people

## Social Media
- Instagram: @acmecorp
- LinkedIn: /company/acmecorp
- Posting frequency: 3x/week
